rationale: The diff only adds execution metadata and does not include any of the required UI or API changes, so none of the acceptance criteria can be verified as implemented.

findings.summary: No change updates `IMPACT_MATRIX_OPERATIONS` to include `create` and `update`, so the required five-operation matrix is not implemented.
No change adds the proposed-policy state slots or the second proposed-policy fetch/reset flow, so the required proposed impact-matrix behavior is absent.

The only modified file is execution metadata; there is no evidence of the API extension for optional `policyOverride` or any implementation that could satisfy the typecheck, lint, and existing policy-authoring test requirements.
